item.dc:creator: Thund3rbolt

item.title: Chicken Shawarma
item.description: 1 tablespoon corriander 1 tablespoon cayenne pepper 1 tablespoon cardamon 1 tablespoon smoked paprika 1 tablespoon ground cumin 1 tablespoon Cinnamon 1 tsp black pepper 1 teaspoon of salt Sour cream Olive oil 2 garlic cloves, pressed 1/2 lemon, the juice About 1.5-2kg boneless chicken thigh 4 hours in the fridge The key to juicy chicken thigh is to cook them hot at 220°C 20-30 min Shawarma Sauce: 1 cup plain yogurt ¼ cup mayonnaise 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice 1 garlic clove, grated Olive oil parsley For 8 Pira bread: 2.5 dl lukewarm water 2/3 pk dry yeast 2 teaspoons of sugar 400 g wheat flour 1 dl Greek yogurt 1 teaspoon of salt 4 tbsp olive oil Source: skrapatallerken / ninamathea
item.dc:creator: HotCoffee9520

item.title: Chatty kitties part 13

Please, check your WiFi (aka. wireless fireless).
Just kidding; I know it's wireless fisting.
Anyway, enjoy the kitty cats.
Dog tax: Rocco in sentry mode. Part 1 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-2H36dD7 Part 2 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-2-At4BDLA Part 3 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-3-1kWpow7 Part 4 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-4-CelEHoq Part 5 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-5-ZaTUgym Part 6 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-6-iTGAyBs Part 7 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-7-OtLSfZK Part 8 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-8-B9QnwnD Part 9 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-9-5ctDpZm Part 10 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-10-tT7WhM8 Part 11 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-11-popEHkF Part 12 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-12-yDJWYyi
item.dc:creator: timmargh

item.title: I'll give it a shot
item.description: I left the country, but my family is in touch with me. They still wear hijabs, even at home with the family. I hope they will not be criticising me on the video for not wearing a hijab, but it won't be a surprise. It's a country where something can get viral very easily if one spreads hatred regarding my "outfit". if you're interested, this is the video https://youtu.be/eq5A-vfIjis I wrote this during COVID lockdown, and felt like it was the end of the world lol. (I messed up an earlier post, reposted it!) edit: wow! the amount of support from here is shocking, it's so humbling to know there is still kindness in this world, thank you so much everyone. It's so encouraging for me to keep sharing my music. I will not forget this moment. (originally posted by @here4smiles on 2023-07-07 07:48:02)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Let's help some Imgurians today
item.description:
Hey everyone it's MrPuckett here with TheFreePizzaDude! If you'd like to send food to an Imgurian going through a tough time, there are 2 easy ways on this post -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them, then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and one of the Angels will send the food for you!
If you'd like one of us to send the food for you - https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 8pm central
Cobbler is here to show you how it works for requests
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
13,710 meals since we started 835 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going!! ... 235 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 330 5th and 6th by Pizza Angel @jennytornado 340 7th by Pizza Angel @TheCraicen 415 8th and 9th by Pizza Angel @jennytornado 435 10th, 11th, 12th and 13th by @OP 445 14th by Pizza Angel @OuchYoureOnMyHair 515 15th, 16th, 17th and 18th by @OP 520 19th by Pizza Angel @jaenen 540 20th and 21st by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 600 22nd by Pizza Angel @gaggingforit 620 Michael Jordan, Kobe Bryant and 25th by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 645 26th, 27th, 28th and 29th by @OP 700 30th by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 710 31st and 32nd by Pizza Angel @NoRoutesFound 715 33rd, 34th, 35th and 36th by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams ... Today's Grocery Tally 410 1st by Grocery Angel @AyatollahBahloni 510 2nd by @OP 530 3rd by Grocery Angel @StabbyTheCat 600 4th by Grocery Angel @nedster64 ... Alright everyone that's it for @OP Today we sent out 36 meals Filled 4 huge grocery orders That's 13,746 meals since we started 839 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: Roman Engineering.
item.description: No, this is NOT an AI image. This is the massive Segovia Aqueduct, built during the reign of Emperor Trajan between 98 and 117 AD, which is a testament to the ingenuity of Roman engineering. Remarkably preserved, this monumental structure spans 727 meters and rises with 165 arches, each exceeding 9 meters in height. Uniquely, it is assembled from blocks of dark Guadarrama granite, laid without mortar, demonstrating the precision and durability of ancient Roman construction techniques.
item.dc:creator: Marco1959Collodi

item.title: skip the weed killer
item.description: Round Up is an herbicide manufactured by Monsanto (now owned by Bayer) and there are more than 50,000 of lawsuits against the company, (many of which its already lost) because Round Up causes cancer too. https://imgur.com/gallery/jurors-award-289-million-to-man-who-got-terminal-cancer-from-monsantos-roundup-weedkiller-IKZx69R Here's info on the relationship between pesticides, GMOs, and corporations preventing independent research: https://imgur.com/gallery/gmos-science-scientists-are-reporting-suppression-of-scientific-data-are-calling-law-mandating-transparency-of-study-results-yeb2l4f
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.dc:creator: TheWoodsAreVile

item.title: I met Mister Savage at FanExpo in Denver CO
item.description:
He got down on one knee. Most people just hover over me.
Best day ever! Update! I made viral!!! I don't know if he will see this but I appreciate his team or the staff at FanExpo helping him. I recently had back surgery on July 3rd and found out last minute he was attending, I didn't even know FanExpo was this weekend. It's been one of my dreams to meet him and I am so happy I did. Back to recovery.
item.dc:creator: allthefoodIputinmymouth

item.title: No question about that ....
item.description: If you've ever wondered what the word of a Supreme Court Justice is worth .... "I believe that no one is above the law under our system and that includes the president." ~ now-Chief Justice John Roberts in his 2005 confirmation hearing "No person in this country, no matter how high or powerful, is above the law." ~ Justice Samuel Alito, in his 2006 confirmation hearing "We're all equal before the law...The foundation of our Constitution was that... the presidency would not be a monarchy...[T]he president is not above the law, no one is above the law." ~ Justice Brett Kavanaugh to the Senate in 2018
item.dc:creator: blank666man

item.title: Cleanest crawlspace
